descriptions: Level progression numbers are different
Level and path numbers differ from reference
Different level state and coin count displayed.
Game board position different
Marble board is shown flat/frontal and overlaps the path nodes, whereas reference shows it tilted in perspective and positioned above the path with a gap
The tiltable marble board is completely straight (unrotated) and overlapping behind/underneath the level path nodes, unlike the rotated and separated design in the reference.
Status bar elements present
Status bar visible in ours but not in reference
iOS Status bar elements (time, signal, battery) are visible at the top of the screen.
Game board marbles are in completely different positions
Game board grid size and ball arrangement differ significantly
The layout of the game pieces (marbles, shooters, and empty spots) completely differs from the reference, representing a different game state or puzzle setup.
Coin count value different
Coin count value differs
The coin counter value at the bottom-left is incorrect.
Status bar elements present
Status bar (time, battery icon) visible in ours but not in reference
System status bar elements are visible at the top of the screen in our version.
Hint button text formatting
The font style of the text inside the 'HINT' button at the bottom-right does not match the reference design.
Orange RESTART button added above green button
Extra RESTART button added that doesn't exist in reference
Device status bar information (time '4:50' and battery charging icon) is visible on top of the dialog header.
Bottom button text completely different
Bottom button says HOME instead of CLOSE, and RESET PROGRESS link missing
RESET PROGRESS text missing below buttons
CLOSE button missing entirely
Close 'X' button design differs, includes battery icon overlapping it
The buttons at the bottom of the dialog differ completely from the reference design.
Top coin counter UI element is missing
Coin balance indicator (75) shown at top right is missing
The coin counterbalance displaying '75' in the top right-hand corner is completely missing.
Replay button added that doesn't exist in reference
Extra scattered coin graphics falling around and below the card are not in the reference
Stray animated/static gold coins are scattered vertically on the bottom-left area of the card extending onto the background.
Next button positioned inside card instead of below
Card is not centered vertically; positioned lower with extra empty space at top, and layout is compressed/cut off differently than reference
The 'Next' button is incorrectly positioned inside the main modal card instead of floating below it as a prominent CTA.
Main card appears wider
Card and elements are stretched/sized differently, appearing larger and less proportioned than reference
Wood paneling background behind the card is missing
The wooden board texture/backing behind the card is missing in our rendering.
Reward amount styling differs; missing coin icon inline and '+' prefix, color is orange instead of white with black outline
The 'NEXT' button text color, capitalization, and font styling differ.
Crying emoji is missing from the dialog
Sad emoji face illustration missing from card
The crying face emoji/illustration in the center of the dialog is missing.
Different message text
Main message text differs and is missing 'No hearts left!' line
The main message text inside the card is different in content, typography, and styling.
Status bar elements present
Extra 'Quit' text link not present in reference
Standard OS status bar (time, signal, battery) is visible on our screen but hidden in the reference.
Different text styling for retry option
Retry button style changed from large filled button to plain text link
Buttons do not use the stylized 3D game font and differ in style.
Button layout completely different
The entire layout, structure, and button configuration of the card dialog differ significantly.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 55% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
